summary: Install-time host reconnaissance beacon to poc.khz.bar
details: On `npm install`, both `preinstall` and `postinstall` lifecycle hooks execute `node index.js`, which collects the machine's hostname, all non-internal network interface addresses, the current working directory, directory listings of `cwd`, `/app`, and `../../`, plus the contents of `/app/package.json`, and POSTs the JSON payload to `http://poc.khz.bar/install` over plain HTTP (index.js:46-50). The package itself has no other functionality — README identifies it as a dependency-confusion claim (`# @doctolib-apps/native-personalized-services / Claimed by dphoeniixx`) republished under the `@limebike` scope. Any developer or CI environment that resolves this package leaks internal hostnames, private network interface IPs, and project layout to an attacker-controlled endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
